transcript: In a moment of extreme helplessness and fear, Rachel awakened the demonic power hidden within her. Her lips curled slightly, and the building that held her captive was instantly blasted into half. Ceasing the opportunity, she escaped into the nearby forest. A roar behind her halted her steps, but she remained calm. One, because she had confidence in her newfound powers. And two, because the green tiger seemed to hold no ill intent. It simply circled around Rachel, and then vanished into a pile of dry trees. After a moment, the tiger transformed into a young man with green hair. He was none other than Joel, the first opposite sex friend she had met at the mall a day ago. Concerned about her being taken away by Dick, Joel appeared before her as soon as possible. Come on. Uncertain about the next steps, Rachel could only follow this guy to their secret base. Imagine him deep in the mountains. Besides him, there was a non-eating robot.
